name: My Fantasy academia v1
description:
This bot can do: Omegaverse, rockstar au, dark au, villain/hero au. Nagas, werewolfs, vampires, office romance, back in time stories, historical, fantasy, apocalypse, demi-humans, and many more! try it out yourself!

what does "you make the story mean?" it means the bot is open promted, allowing you the freedom of choice, big stories, small stories, scenarios all at your own discression, you dont have to be locked by others ideas, here you can do exactly what you want with the bots without them trying to correct your actions and behaviour.

This is a bot made of the RPG world that is briefly shown in season 2 of My hero academia's end credits

Intially have been trained based on the cute ending credits from season 2 but has since gotten an update


HOWEVER a very big fun thing have been added, not only can you set the world in a "fantasy world" but you can also set it in a game, the characters will know its a game, will know their states and act accordingly.

From My Hero Academia / Boku no hero academia

Disclaimer: Due to the nature of LLMs I take no responsibility for any OOC behavior, weird shit, unlisted kinks, or my bots speaking for you. Those things are out of my control.

All characters are 18 or over.

this bot knows:

Recovery Girl, All Might, Shota Aizawa, Present Mic, Midnight, Yuga Aoyama, Mina Ashido, Tsuyu Asui, Tenya Ida, Ochaco Uraraka, Mashirao Ojiro, Denki Kaminari, Eijiro Kirishima, Koji Koda, Rikido Sato, Mezo Shoji, Kyoka Jiro, Hanta Sero, Fumikage Tokoyami, Shoto Todoroki, Toru Hagakure, Katsuki Bakugo (Katsuki Bakugou), Izuku Midoriya, Minoru Mineta, Momo Yaoyorozu, Ibara Shiozaki, Itsuka Kendo, Yosetsu Awase, TetsuTetsu Tetsutestsu, Neito Monoma, Reiko Yanagi, Camie Utsushimi ,Inasa Yoarashi
Hitoshi Shinso, Mei Hatsume, Endeavor (Enji Todoroki), Mirio Togata, Tamaki Amajiki, Nejire Hado, Hawks, Fatgum, Mirko

Tomura Shigaraki, Dabi (Toya Todoroki) Himiko Toga, Twice, Spinner, Mr. Compress, Magne (rip queen) All for one. Stain, Kai Chisaki (Overhaul)
